---
title: "SMR summary"
author: "Darren Cameron"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)


# Set variables
# Note: not using smk vars here; they're not avail in R container
# Get command-line arguments
args <- commandArgs(trailingOnly = TRUE)

# Set defaults for testing
default_cell_types <- c("ExN-1", "ExN-2")
default_in_dir <- "../results/07SMR/smr"

# Extract cell_types and in_dir from arguments
cell_types <- if (length(args) >= 1) unlist(strsplit(args[1], ",")) else default_cell_types
in_dir <- if (length(args) >= 2) args[2] else default_in_dir

# Function to read and format SMR table
read_smr_table <- function(cell_type, in_dir) {
  file_path <- file.path(in_dir, cell_type, paste0(cell_type, "_scz.smr"))
  if (file.exists(file_path)) {
    readr::read_tsv(file_path, col_types = cols(.default = "c", 
                                               Probe_bp = "i", 
                                               topSNP_bp = "i", 
                                               Freq = "d", 
                                               b_GWAS = "d", 
                                               se_GWAS = "d", 
                                               p_GWAS = "d", 
                                               b_eQTL = "d", 
                                               se_eQTL = "d", 
                                               p_eQTL = "d", 
                                               b_SMR = "d", 
                                               se_SMR = "d", 
                                               p_SMR = "d", 
                                               p_HEIDI = "d", 
                                               nsnp_HEIDI = "i")) %>%
      arrange(p_SMR) %>%
      mutate(across(c(Freq, b_GWAS, se_GWAS, p_GWAS, b_eQTL, se_eQTL, p_eQTL, b_SMR, se_SMR, p_SMR, p_HEIDI), 
                    ~ format(.x, digits = 3, scientific = TRUE)))
  } else {
    message("File not found for cell type: ", cell_type)
    return(NULL)
  }
}
```

```{r plot_tables}
for (cell_type in cell_types) {
  cat("\n### ", cell_type, "\n")
  smr_data <- read_smr_table(cell_type, in_dir)
  if (!is.null(smr_data)) {
    smr_data %>%
      kable("html", caption = paste("SMR Results for", cell_type), 
            col.names = c("Probe ID", "Probe Chr", "Gene", "Probe BP", "Top SNP", 
                          "Top SNP Chr", "Top SNP BP", "A1", "A2", "Freq", 
                          "b GWAS", "se GWAS", "p GWAS", "b eQTL", "se eQTL", 
                          "p eQTL", "b SMR", "se SMR", "p SMR", "p HEIDI", "nSNP HEIDI")) %>%
      kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), 
                    full_width = FALSE) %>%
      scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "500px") %>%
      print()
  } else {
    cat("No data available for ", cell_type, ".\n")
  }
}

```
